steps.t: The footprint you found lies to the west of Echad Idhrenfair. Himeinior has asked you to return to the site of the footprint you found and track the b…
The second footprint lies to the south of the first, which was to the west of Echad Idhrenfair. You should continue to track the beast to its lair.
The third footprint lies to the west of the second, south and west of Echad Idhrenfair. You should continue tracking the beast to its lair.
The fourth footprint lies to the west of the third, south and west of Echad Idhrenfair. You should continue tracking the beast to its lair.
The fifth footprint lies to the south-west of the fourth. You should continue tracking the beast to its lair.
Himeinior is at Echad Idhrenfair, north-east of the Grey King's lair. You have defeated the creature known as the Grey King and should return to Himei…
